## Overview

```{r overview-prep, include=FALSE}
n_cells   <- ncol(scMultiData)
n_genes   <- nrow(scMultiData)
sample_tbl <- as.data.frame(table(scMultiData$Sample))
colnames(sample_tbl) <- c("Sample", "Cells")

modality_tbl <- data.frame(
  Modality = c("RNA", "ADT", "VDJ-T", "VDJ-B", "ATAC"),
  Detected = c(modalities$hasRNA, modalities$hasADT,
               modalities$hasVDJ_T, modalities$hasVDJ_B,
               modalities$hasATAC),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
modality_tbl$Detected <- ifelse(modality_tbl$Detected, "yes", "no")
```

**Dataset summary**

- **Total cells:** `r format(n_cells, big.mark = ",")`
- **Total RNA features:** `r format(n_genes, big.mark = ",")`
- **Default assay:** `r DefaultAssay(scMultiData)`
- **Assays present:** `r paste(Assays(scMultiData), collapse = ", ")`
- **Reductions present:** `r paste(names(scMultiData@reductions), collapse = ", ")`

**Modality detection**

```{r overview-modalities, echo=FALSE}
knitr::kable(modality_tbl)
```

**Sample composition**

```{r overview-samples, echo=FALSE}
knitr::kable(sample_tbl)
```

```{r overview-rna-umap, echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
if ("umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) {
  p <- DimPlot(scMultiData, reduction = "umap",
               group.by = "Sample", raster = FALSE) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
    ggtitle("RNA UMAP - by Sample")
  print(p)
}
```
